pain_points.painpoint: Test site approval processes are too long, significantly delaying R&D progress.

source_metadata.evidence_original: 土地交通局（LTA）与新加坡科技公司合作开发无人驾驶巴士项目，但该公司反映测试场地审批流程过长，严重延误了研发进度。
source_metadata.evidence_translated: LTA cooperates with a Singaporean tech company to develop autonomous bus projects, but the company reported that test site approval processes are too long, significantly delaying R&D progress.
